hero.description: Security Architect & Senior Information Security Analyst with 20+ years of experience spanning insurance, financial services, oil & gas, pharmaceuticals, and IT. Specialist in secure architecture design, regulatory compliance, AI agent orchestration, and PKI — with certified expertise in Lean Six Sigma and ITIL V3, actively pursuing CISSP.
about.label: Professional Profile
about.title: Who I am
about.p1: Cybersecurity Architect with over two decades protecting critical infrastructure in insurance, financial services, oil & gas, pharmaceuticals, and IT. I have led security audits under NIST, CIS, PCI-DSS, and ISO 27001 for IBM, PwC clients, and regional projects. Certified in Lean Six Sigma and ITIL V3, with CISSP in progress — combining process improvement discipline with deep technical audit expertise across multinational, cross-cultural environments.
about.quote: «Security is not added at the end: it is designed from the architecture. Every system must be verifiable, auditable, and defensible by construction.»
about.p2: Cybersecurity architect with two decades integrating security into critical infrastructure, financial services, oil & gas, and global consulting. I combine Big Corp experience (IBM, PwC) with hands-on innovation: developing and operating my own multi-agent orchestration stack with integrated governance. My approach merges the rigor of enterprise design with the agility of direct implementation on real infrastructure.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.openclaw_opencode: Orchestrated the Prod-01 project with opencode: a 7-agent AI platform with strict SDD flow (PASO-1..13 + INIT-0), governance enforce system with security veto, MCP integration, and full RADAR traceability cycle — positioned as the multi-agent orchestration standard for upcoming OpenClaw stack cycles
experience.openclaw_agents: Designed and operate a multi-agent orchestration stack with 11 specialized LLMs on self-hosted infrastructure, implementing governance architecture with a security agent co-administrator and veto authority
experience.openclaw_memory: Built persistent multi-agent memory system with RAG, Qdrant/sqlite-vec vectors, and automated conversational context management via cron jobs
experience.openclaw_infra: Integrated full infrastructure stack: MCP servers, n8n workflows, Open WebUI + Ollama, inter-container Docker networking, Tailscale VPN, and complex network/DNS incident resolution
experience.openclaw_security: Implemented OpenWrt router hardening with layered DNS (dnsmasq → Unbound → DoH/DNSCrypt), Squid+ClamAV proxy via C-ICAP, and network monitoring with Suricata/Zeek/nDPI
experience.openclaw_kvm: Led KVM/libvirt migration of 8 Linux VMs; identified and remediated critical security vulnerability (Metasploitable2 VM bridged to LAN WiFi)
experience.opencode_platform: Implemented opencode as the core orchestration platform: AI-native CLI with 7 multi-model agents, pre/post-action governance enforcement, isolated Docker sandbox, and SDD cycle with full RADAR traceability
experience.prisma_desacople: Designed and implemented security architecture for the IT infrastructure decoupling project of Prisma, Payway, and NewPay with zero operational downtime
experience.prisma_risk: Developed threat assessments and risk management plans ensuring resource separation and business continuity
experience.prisma_team: Coordinated cross-functional teams to ensure robust protection throughout the transition
experience.cloudlegion_systems: Designed and maintained integrated security systems aligned with organizational IT requirements
experience.cloudlegion_threat: Conducted threat modeling and vulnerability assessments to proactively identify and mitigate risks
experience.cloudlegion_stakeholders: Collaborated with stakeholders to implement and monitor security measures with minimal operational disruption
experience.pwc_audits: Led security audits for US clients under NIST and CIS frameworks, reviewing applications, processes, and IAM
experience.pwc_gaps: Identified security gaps and developed remediation strategies aligned with regulatory standards
experience.pwc_liaison: Served as primary stakeholder liaison to improve compliance and operational resilience
experience.teisa_b1: Led a team of Business Development consultants, driving the strategic rollout of security initiatives
experience.teisa_b2: Conducted commercial evaluations and data analysis to identify improvement opportunities
experience.teisa_b3: Developed plans balancing sales objectives with quality assurance standards
openclaw.label: Flagship Project
openclaw.title: OpenClaw System
openclaw.desc: OpenClaw is a proprietary AI agent orchestration system independently designed, built, and operated. With 11 specialized agents running on CPU-only self-hosted hardware, it implements an advanced security governance architecture: the security agent acts as co-administrator with veto power over infrastructure actions, preventing hallucinations and unauthorized autonomous actions.
openclaw.hw_val: Self-hosted server · AMD Ryzen 7 PRO · 32GB RAM · CPU-only
openclaw.market_note: This experience positions the professional uniquely at the intersection of cybersecurity and AI/automation — two of the highest-demand, lowest-supply fields in LATAM 2025-2026. Capabilities include AI governance, hallucination detection, persistent memory architecture, and infrastructure hardening for autonomous systems.
opencode.label: Orchestration Platform
opencode.title: open<wbr>code & Prod‑01
opencode.desc: Prod-01 is a multi-agent orchestration project built on opencode, an AI-native CLI for software engineering. It implements a 7-agent architecture with differentiated LLM models, a 13-step SDD flow, and a governance system where the security agent holds absolute veto power over infrastructure actions.
opencode.desc2: The stack runs 100% self-hosted on a CPU-only server, with isolated Docker sandbox, pre/post-action enforcement, MCP integration, and full RADAR traceability — no GPU or cloud services required.
opencode.agents_val: 7 specialized · Main · Security · Change Mgr · Planner · Coder · Dev · Research
opencode.models_val: deepseek-v4-flash · deepseek-v4-pro · qwen3-coder:480b · devstral-2:123b · minimax-m2.7 · deepseek-v3.2 · glm-5.2
opencode.sdd_val: 13 steps · PASO-1..13 + INIT-0 · Pre/Post action enforcement
opencode.sandbox_val: Isolated Docker · 10 controls C1-C10 · no-root · read-only · network bridge
opencode.governance_val: Security veto · Checkpoint validation · RADAR traceability · Git commit hooks
opencode.infra_val: Self-hosted CPU-only · Docker · Ollama · n8n · MCP · Tailscale
opencode.market_note: Prod-01 demonstrates the ability to design, deploy, and operate a multi-agent system with integrated security governance — not as an added feature but as a design condition. The combination of SDD orchestration, security veto, isolated sandbox, and forensic traceability positions this stack as a reference for environments where AI agent autonomy must be controlled by design.
